# Content Model

## Overview

All content is stored in Firebase Firestore. This document describes the collection structure, field definitions, and conventions used across the public website.

---

## Collections

### `places`

The primary content collection. Each document represents a place in or around Qarnayel.

**Document ID**: auto-generated by Firebase, referenced as `id` in the domain model.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slug` | `string` | ✅ | URL-safe, lowercase, hyphenated, ASCII only |
| `placeType` | `'attraction' \| 'service'` | ✅ | |
| `category` | `PlaceCategory` | ✅ | See category enum below |
| `contactMode` | `'guide' \| 'owner' \| 'none'` | ✅ | Controls contact CTA rendering |
| `status` | `'draft' \| 'published' \| 'archived'` | ✅ | Only `published` is visible publicly |
| `featured` | `boolean` | ✅ | Shown on homepage featured section |
| `title` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | |
| `subtitle` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | |
| `shortDescription` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | Used on cards, max ~150 chars |
| `description` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | Full rich description |
| `seo` | `{ ar: SeoFields; en: SeoFields }` | ✅ | |
| `contact` | `PlaceContact` | ✅ (object) | Can have empty fields inside |
| `location` | `PlaceLocation` | ✅ (object) | Can have empty fields inside |
| `images` | `MediaReference[]` | ✅ | At least one image expected |
| `resources` | `PlaceResource[]` | optional | Source links and references |
| `createdAt` | `Timestamp` | ✅ | Firestore server timestamp |
| `updatedAt` | `Timestamp` | ✅ | Firestore server timestamp |

### `history`

Historical entries about Qarnayel, ordered and sourced.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order` | `number` | ✅ | Determines display order (ascending) |
| `title` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | Section title |
| `body` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ | Main content |
| `period` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | optional | e.g. "Byzantine era" |
| `sources` | `HistorySource[]` | optional | All factual claims should be sourced |
| `status` | `'draft' \| 'published' \| 'archived'` | ✅ | Only `published` is visible |
| `updatedAt` | `Timestamp` | ✅ | |

### `pageContent`

Static page content managed via the admin dashboard.

| Field | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `slug` | `string` | ✅ |
| `title` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `body` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `seo` | `{ ar: SeoFields; en: SeoFields }` | ✅ |
| `updatedAt` | `Timestamp` | ✅ |

Page slugs: `about`, `contact`

### `siteSettings`

Single document. Document ID: `global`.

| Field | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `siteName` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `tagline` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `heroTitle` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `heroSubtitle` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `ctaExplorePlaces` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `ctaDiscoverHistory` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `townIntroduction` | `{ ar: string; en: string }` | ✅ |
| `contactEmail` | `string` | optional |
| `contactPhone` | `string` | optional |
| `socialLinks` | `{ facebook?: string; instagram?: string }` | optional |

---

## Enum values

### PlaceCategory

| Value | Label (ar) | Label (en) |
|---|---|---|
| `forest` | غابة | Forest |
| `lake` | بحيرة | Lake |
| `restaurant` | مطعم | Restaurant |
| `shop` | متجر | Shop |
| `pharmacy` | صيدلية | Pharmacy |
| `salon` | صالون | Salon |
| `landmark` | معلم | Landmark |
| `other` | أخرى | Other |

### PlaceType

| Value | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `attraction` | Natural landmark, historical site, scenic location |
| `service` | Business or service establishment |

### ContactMode

| Value | Contact CTA behaviour |
|---|---|
| `guide` | Show "Contact a guide" CTA |
| `owner` | Show "Contact the place" CTA with place contact info |
| `none` | No contact CTA shown |

---

## MediaReference structure

```json
{
  "path": "places/abc123/hero.jpg",
  "url": "https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/...",
  "alt": { "ar": "غابة قرنايل", "en": "Qarnayel Cedar Forest" },
  "isPrimary": true
}
```

- `path`: Storage path — used to reconstruct URL if needed
- `url`: Pre-resolved public download URL stored in Firestore
- `alt`: Must be provided in both languages
- `isPrimary`: Only one image per place should be marked as primary

---

## Published-only guarantee

The public website **must never display draft or archived content**. Every Firestore query in the public repositories includes:

```ts
where('status', '==', 'published')
```

This is enforced at both the repository level (code) and the Firestore security rules level. See [firebase-setup.md](./firebase-setup.md).

---

## Localization completeness

Both `ar` and `en` are mandatory for all `LocalizedText` fields. The admin project is responsible for enforcing completeness before setting `status: 'published'`.

If a field is incomplete, the admin must not publish the document. The public website assumes completeness for all published documents.

---

## No events

The Events feature is intentionally excluded from this version of the project. Do not scaffold event types, collections, or pages.
